channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Early-onset dementia diagnosis highlights challenges in accessing support for Australian families
item.description: The article explores the lived experience of Lisa, who was diagnosed with Alzheimer’s disease, a form of dementia, at the age of 47. Her partner, Luke, describes a gradual but noticeable decline in he...

item.title: Daily horoscope predictions for June 1, 2026 across all zodiac signs
item.description: This article presents the daily horoscope for June 1, 2026, offering astrological guidance for each zodiac sign along with a special note for those celebrating their birthday today. The birthday messa...

item.title: Otti announces planned Umuahia Stadium City as Chukwueze visits Abia Government House
item.description: Abia State Governor, Alex Otti, has hosted Super Eagles winger and Abia-born football star, Samuel Chukwueze, at the Government House in Umuahia during a recent visit that also highlighted major devel...

item.title: Tanzania government gains 16% non-dilutable stake in Lindi Jumbo graphite mine via Ndovu Graphite JV
item.description: The Tanzanian government formalized a 16% non-dilutable equity stake in the Lindi Jumbo graphite mine, located in Ruangwa District, Lindi Region, through a joint venture that established Ndovu Graphit...

item.title: First Nations opposition grows over Brisbane 2032 Olympic stadium plans for Victoria Park
item.description: Construction is due to begin on Brisbane’s new Olympic stadium at Victoria Park, a central element of the city’s preparations for the 2032 Olympic and Paralympic Games. However, the project has sparke...

item.title: Kapamilya Love Teams Share Behind-the-Scenes Moments at ASAP XP Big Dome Show

item.title: Ecca Vandal reflects on creative independence and her return with a second album
item.description: Ecca Vandal, the Australian-South African punk and alternative artist, has spoken about her return to music following a period of stepping away from the industry to rediscover her creative identity. A...

item.title: Rick and Morty Season 9 Episode 2 Delivers an Emotional Look at Rick's Inner Conflict
item.description: Rick and Morty Season 9 bounces back strongly in its second episode, 'Ricks Days, Seven Nights,' following a less impressive premiere. The episode delves deeply into the emotional and psychological st...

item.title: Aurat March in Karachi highlights resistance, state hurdles, and demands for women’s rights
item.description: The Aurat March in Karachi, held on May 10, 2026, took place amid significant administrative and political hurdles imposed by authorities. Organisers faced delays in securing the mandatory no-objectio...

item.title: Nigeria faces rising flood risks as losses hit N13 trillion and 2026 threats increase
item.description: Nigeria dey face serious flooding wahala as reports show say states never recover from about N13 trillion losses wey happen between 2024 and 2025. Dis losses cover houses, farms, infrastructure, and s...

item.title: 13-year-old charged over alleged school attack plot in Queensland
item.description: A 13-year-old boy from Maryborough, Queensland, has been charged after police allege he was involved in threatening behaviour and planning a possible attack on a local school. The investigation began ...

item.title: Sir Alex Ferguson Critiques Arsenal’s Defensive Approach in Champions League Final Loss to PSG
item.description: Legendary Manchester United coach Sir Alex Ferguson has openly criticised Arsenal's strategy after their dramatic penalty loss to Paris Saint-Germain in the Champions League final. Arsenal had a brigh...

item.title: Jeffrey Epstein associate alleges private invitation from Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor amid ongoing investigation
item.description: Sarah Kellen, a former personal assistant to Jeffrey Epstein, has made new claims in testimony to US congressional investigators alleging that Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor invited her to visit him at a ...

item.title: Bafana Bafana World Cup departure delayed after US visa complications
item.description: Bafana Bafana’s planned departure for their 2026 FIFA World Cup preparations has been delayed following complications with US transit visas for members of the squad and technical staff. The South Afri...

item.title: Marcos and Rubio reaffirm PH-US alliance, tackle West Philippine Sea and Luzon Economic Corridor

item.title: Supreme Court defers urgent hearing on plea for CBT-based NEET UG 2026 retest
item.description: The Supreme Court of India on Monday declined to grant an urgent hearing to a plea seeking that the NEET UG 2026 re-examination be conducted in a computer-based test (CBT) format instead of the tradit...

item.title: Faith Mangope on How Her Upbringing Influenced Her Journalism and Views on Social Justice
item.description: Faith Mangope, the award-winning Metro FM broadcaster, credits her tough childhood in Mpumalanga and Johannesburg for shaping her approach to journalism and social activism. Growing up in poverty, fac...

item.title: Concerns raised over AUKUS Pillar II undersea drones and lack of implementation detail
item.description: The article examines Australia’s evolving AUKUS defence arrangement, focusing on the emerging role of uncrewed undersea systems under Pillar II of the agreement. While undersea drones are broadly seen...

item.title: Kano NDC Candidate Criticizes Gov Yusuf Over Rising Insecurity in the State
item.description: The governorship candidate of the Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC) in Kano State, former Deputy Governor Aminu Abdussalam Gwarzo, don sharply criticize Governor Abba Kabir Yusuf over the worsening se...

item.title: Curated alternative news roundup on nuclear issues, climate, and global politics
item.description: This article is a curated roundup of alternative news items focused on nuclear issues, climate change, geopolitics, and related social and environmental topics. It presents a broad selection of headli...
